title: The immunology ecosystem in South Africa: striking an equitable balance between fostering discovery, promoting translation and capacity building.
author_string: Gray, Clive M, Borger, Jessica G
abstract: In the vast and diverse continent of Africa, the field of immunology holds immense significance as it navigates the complex landscape of infectious diseases and public health challenges. In this article, we speak with Professor Clive Gray, who provides powerful and valuable insights into the unique research opportunities and immunological advancements supported by Africa's unique blend of social, economic and environmental factors and also discusses the societal and cultural challenges that need to be overcome for equitable research to be achieved across the continent.
